subject: physics
title: 19N.1.HL.TZ0.14
question_html:
A pipe of length 0.6 m is filled with a gas and closed at one end. The speed of sound in the gas is 300 m s–1. What are the frequencies of the first two harmonics in the tube?

A.  125 Hz and 250 Hz

B.  125 Hz and 375 Hz

C.  250 Hz and 500 Hz

D.  250 Hz and 750 Hz
